title: Upgrade vendored RepoPact to 1.4.0 and close the orphan-work-dir blind spot

preflight.note: Created before mutating vendored RepoPact tooling, schemas, or governance records for this upgrade.

acceptance_criteria.text: Vendored RepoPact tooling is brought to 1.4.0 (doctor.py, takeover.py, track_import.py, and refreshed adopt_repo.py/plan_import.py/repopact_cli.py) while preserving ForgeLink's local preflight extension in validate_repo.py and work-item.schema.json.

validate_repo.py fails when a directory under work/ holds planning content (README/AGENTS/_audit) but no work-item.json, so load-bearing planning that is invisible to the ledger and dashboard is a hard error rather than silently passing.
repopact doctor reports dead source_of_truth frontmatter pointers (path-like targets that do not exist) as drift findings.
After the change the repository validates, repopact doctor reports healthy, and a negative test proves the new orphan check rejects a manifest-less planning directory.
A decision record captures that ForgeLink vendors RepoPact 1.4.0 with two local extensions (preflight marker and orphan/dead-pointer detection) and how to re-sync with upstream.
